ip_risk_notes: Sudoku is a generic puzzle format. Avoid 'Will Shortz', 'Penny Press', 'KAPPA', 'New York Times' style branding.

unique_hook.angle: Tier-graded EXTRA-large numbers (24pt+) with one puzzle per page + completion stickers; top-10 mostly cluster 4 puzzles per page or use 18pt only

evergreen_baseline.evidence: Sudoku for seniors is a perennial gift category — Google Trends shows stable 5y baseline with mild Q4 lift

repeat_buyer.audience: Seniors + adult-children buying gifts (Christmas, birthdays, Mother's/Father's Day)

leading_indicators.google_trends: Sudoku evergreen (5y stable baseline, no major decline)
leading_indicators.etsy: Printable sudoku market exists but small relative to Amazon
